trivia: Four nations built Europe's delta-canard air superiority fighter, and it now guards airspace from the North Sea to the Gulf. Quick Reaction Alert scrambles occasionally gift it to lucky antennas.
If a Typhoon appears in your log with unusual speed and climb figures, you may have caught someone's very bad day being intercepted.
funFacts: Built jointly by the UK, Germany, Italy and Spain.
Can supercruise above Mach 1 without afterburner.
